title: Cross-implementation parity review 2026-07-23 (Python/Rust/Zephyr)
description: Consolidated findings from the 2026-07-23 cross-implementation reviewer pass over Python (python/src/lichen), Rust (rust/), Zephyr C (lichen/subsys/lichen), against test/vectors/*.json and spec/. Five-domain review: link+schnorr48, SCHC, RPL+routing, OSCORE/CoAP/LCI/SLIP, app-layer formats. All findings empirically verified with file:line evidence. NOTE: this worktree (HEAD c4e190f879) is 22025 commits behind origin/main (merge-base 936600c332); findings describe the checked-out tree and flag where origin/main already differs.
